channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Your essential services are one surprise failure away from disruption. Consider how physical AI could tackle the crisis
item.description: I'm a physical AI founder and I'm shocked by how our entire economy runs on essential services maintained with methods from the Roman era. Time for ch...

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Sunday, February 15
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: A Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms’ Egg Has Spoiled A Huge Dunk Revelation
item.description: A Knight Of The Seven Kingdom’s Egg has gone off script, talking about a potentially big season 2 spoiler, and confirming a huge Thrones fan theory.

item.title: MacKenzie Scott says her college roommate loaned her $1,000 so she wouldn’t have to drop out—and is now inspiring her to give away billions
item.description: MacKenzie Scott has donated $26 billion in the past several years.

item.title: Nothing Opens First India Flagship: Why 2,000 Fans Just Mobbed ‘Rebellious’ New Store
item.description: Nothing today opened its first store in India, with a space-age look and 2,000 people in line to experience what it calls a participatory space.

item.title: Private equity’s playbook to shake off the zombies: meet the continuation vehicle
item.description: At one end of the market are the trophy assets, at the other are assets that have yet to meet return targets.

item.title: A widow lost $39,000, her house, and six dogs after a scam. ‘If the story wasn’t so horrible, people wouldn’t pay attention’
item.description: Americans are being defrauded out of billions through an epidemic of romance and investment schemes and it can happen to anybody, authorities warn.

item.title: Even Elon Musk Is Playing ‘ARC Raiders’
item.description: The world's richest man, Elon Musk, has said that he's playing ARC Raiders in his free time, his latest gaming endeavor.

item.title: Our K-12 school system is sending us a message: AI tools are for the rich kids
item.description: I worked in Chicago, and saw a world of difference between the North and South Side.

item.title: ‘Wuthering Heights’ Rotten Tomatoes Audience Score Slips Past ‘Barbie’
item.description: Rotten Tomatoes audiences scores for Wuthering Heights are in, and they are high that both critics and even Barbie.

item.title: These ‘safer’ chip stocks have boomed this year. Is it too late to buy in?
Who needs chocolates? Vacuums and car tires are the new Valentine's Day treats.
Tax refunds are up this year, early IRS numbers show. See how yours compares.
How a riptide around AI and stocks could affect Fed decisions and housing market
You can now use buy-now-pay-later to pay your rent — but watch out for the fees
Inflation eased slightly in January but remained well above the Fed's target
item.description: The Labor Department on Friday released the January 2026 consumer price index (CPI), which showed that inflation remained elevated above the Federal R...

item.title: SpaceX launches crew to International Space Station after prior team's medical evacuation
item.description: SpaceX and NASA launched a new crew to the International Space Station on Friday, around one month after a previous crew had to be brought home early.

item.title: Gas prices fall in January, giving Americans a break at the pump
item.description: Gas prices dropped 7.5% over the past year, bringing welcome relief to American consumers as inflation data shows energy costs declining nationwide.

item.title: Mortgage rates edge lower, hover near 6%
item.description: The average rate on a 30-year fixed mortgage slipped this week to 6.09%, according to the latest Freddie Mac data released Thursday. That is down from...

item.title: Gun accessory maker to pay $1.75M to Buffalo mass shooting victims’ families
item.description: A Georgia gun accessory maker will pay $1.75 million to victims' families of the 2022 Buffalo mass shooting and halt New York sales of its MA Lock dev...

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
